transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Bright Smile Dental. This is Aria. How can I help

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi Aria, I’m Devin Carter, a new patient, and I’d like to schedule my first appointment for this Friday at 2:30 PM because I’ve been experiencing tooth sensitivity.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Your appointment is booked for Friday, June fifth at two thirty PM. Your confirmation ID is BSD one nil nil two. Is there anything else I can help you with today
